tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows a low HbA1c, which may suggest recent hypoglycemia or altered red cell turnover. Glucose, renal, and electrolyte parameters are within normal limits. Lipid profile reveals elevated LDL and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Recommend clinical correlation for low HbA1c and consideration of lipid-lowering and lifestyle interventions.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
